# Cirth v0.2.0

Cirth v0.2.0 narrows the public CSS surface and makes the package easier to
consume as a CSS-first framework. This release focuses on the generated build
set, scoped adoption, packaging, and contributor-facing documentation.

## Highlights

- Added scoped builds for embedding Cirth under a `.cirth` wrapper:
  `cirth.scoped.css` and `cirth.classless.scoped.css`.
- Scoped output now includes root custom properties, document styles, color
  schemes, and modal state selectors inside the `.cirth` boundary.
- Removed inactive build variants that made the distribution larger and less
  clear: fluid classless output, standalone color utility output, and the old
  conditional naming.
- Kept the public package surface CSS-only. SCSS remains source code for the
  repository, not a published Sass API.
- Stopped committing generated `dist/` output. CSS is rebuilt by local builds,
  CI, release artifacts, and package publishing.
- Reworked the README as a user-facing introduction and moved build/tooling
  details into dedicated docs.
- Added issue templates, a pull request template, and clearer contribution
  guidance.
- Updated GitHub Actions to use Node 24-compatible action runtimes.

## Build Surface

The primary generated files are now:

- `dist/cirth.css`
- `dist/cirth.min.css`
- `dist/cirth.classless.css`
- `dist/cirth.classless.min.css`
- `dist/cirth.scoped.css`
- `dist/cirth.scoped.min.css`
- `dist/cirth.classless.scoped.css`
- `dist/cirth.classless.scoped.min.css`

Theme variants are still generated for the maintained build shapes. The theme
set is expected to be reduced in a future release.

## Migration Notes

- Replace `cirth.conditional.css` with `cirth.scoped.css`.
- Replace `cirth.classless.conditional.css` with
  `cirth.classless.scoped.css`.
- Remove any dependency on `cirth.colors.css`; color utilities are no longer a
  standalone public build.
- Remove any dependency on `cirth.fluid.classless.css`; fluid classless output
  is no longer generated.
- Use CSS custom properties for customization. Published npm contents are
  compiled CSS only.

## CDN

GitHub release/CDN URL:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cirthcss/cirth@v0.2.0/dist/cirth.min.css">
```

npm CDN URL after the package is available on npm:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@cirthcss/cirth@0.2.0/dist/cirth.min.css">
```
